management_plans: Expand port operations through SAGT Phase 2 by Q4 2026
Target 15% revenue growth in leisure sector from tourism recovery
Invest LKR 8B in logistics infrastructure over 2 years
Reduce group debt-to-equity ratio to below 0.4 by FY2026
key_risks: Tourism recovery dependent on global economic conditions
Port operations face competition from Hambantota
Consumer goods margins under pressure from import costs
Interest rate environment affects property segment demand
JKH.chairman_outlook: Cautiously optimistic on Sri Lanka's recovery trajectory. Focus on core verticals of ports, logistics, and consumer brands. Tourism segment expected to be the key growth driver as arrival numbers normalize.

management_plans: Launch same-day delivery in Colombo metro area by mid-2026
Expand grocery vertical to 30% of GMV from current 18%
Build out B2B marketplace for SME sellers
Target breakeven on logistics subsidiary within 18 months
key_risks: High customer acquisition costs in competitive e-commerce market
Last-mile delivery costs remain elevated outside Colombo
Dependence on COD payments limits working capital efficiency
KPHL.chairman_outlook: E-commerce penetration in Sri Lanka remains below 2% — massive growth runway. Our logistics network is the competitive moat. Focus on unit economics and path to profitability.
